name: Hot"tailgate" Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
3. Allow it to cook for 1 to 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve the punch warm in a crockpot or a cleaned-out pumpkin.
5. The pumpkin will help keep the punch warm without altering its flavor.
